initial_entry.name: Stonks
initial_entry.author: dmgx0
initial_entry.description: Show live stock, ETF, and crypto prices inline as you type a ticker. Do light math on quotes to track your own portfolio right in your notes. Fetches from Yahoo Finance and works on mobile. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
